en.title: How It Works | Madeira Property Concierge
en.description: See our founder-led process from diagnostic call to monthly operations: property audit, systems setup, and SLA-driven support for Madeira owners abroad.
en.ogTitle: How It Works | Madeira Property Concierge
en.ogDescription: See our founder-led process from diagnostic call to monthly operations: property audit, systems setup, and SLA-driven support for Madeira owners abroad.

pt.title: Como Funciona | Madeira Property Concierge
pt.description: Veja o processo liderado pela fundadora, da chamada de diagnostico ate a operacao mensal: auditoria do imovel, setup de sistemas e suporte por SLA.
pt.ogDescription: Veja o processo liderado pela fundadora, da chamada de diagnostico ate a operacao mensal: auditoria do imovel, setup de sistemas e suporte por SLA.

Your property should run on a system, not on surprises.
